programmes.show_description: Harry Lambert has been on duty all night in the signal box when the delivery of a body causes problems - should it be classed as freight or passenger? S1 E5: The Late Mr Buckly
Phoebe loses her patience when Gary backs out of a part in Noel Coward's new film, unaware that this is because he doesn't want to be recognised in it in the 1990s. S6 E4: Grief Encounter
Mr. Bean loses midnight on New Year's Eve, devises an unusual method of transporting his sales shopping home, and wreaks havoc by doing a spot of decorating. E9: Do-It-Yourself, Mr. Bean
Drama series about a detective who suffers a near-fatal car crash and wakes up in what seems to be 1973, where his 21st-century attitudes make him a fish out of water. Starring John Simm. S1 E1
To lift their spirits, Sandra and Beryl hit the town, where a night of drinks, surprises and misjudged optimism promises more chaos than comfort. S10 E4: On the Town
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!
Malcolm's mother learns the truth about what happened at Mod Shops, and David finds himself volunteering to be the driver for a day out. S3 E4: Breeding
Tracey becomes self-conscious about her appearance and has Botox, Travis gets a tattoo to impress a girl at school, and Sharon looks as if she'll need a hearing aid. S10 E5: Tattoo You
The blunderingly inept master of disaster goes for a haircut - but ends up styling the other customers' hair - and causes chaos at a school fun day. E14: Hair by Mr. Bean of London
David and Amy Pearce arrive in Spain for their 'second honeymoon' using David's redundancy pay. S1 E1: Viva Espana

Nellie and Eli agree to look after their teenage nephew Nigel, Nellie believes it's about time he learns the goings on of the birds and the bees. S3 E2: The Birds And The Bees
The two couples go to see a bullfight to see El Macho in action - David is fascinated, but the fight doesn't live up to his expectations. S1 E2: El Macho
With all the money gone, the Meldrum family and its servants look to the future - can Lady Lavender and Cissy save them all from financial ruin? S4 E6 Well, There You Are Then...!
Rigsby decides to move on, give up on Miss Jones and file for divorce - he places an advert in the local newspaper, but his search for love doesn't run entirely smoothly. S4 E4: Pink Carnations
When Shirley's dad loses his job, Wolfie is determined to win it back and the old man's favour with it - however, nothing goes to plan in a Wolfie Smith campaign... S2 E2: Rebel Without a Pause
The boys consider the impact of their father moving back into the Boswell household, while Nellie is shocked at her husband's changing views on his faith. S2 E5
Beryl's gin-soaked mum, Mrs Hennessey, arrives, insulting everyone. As chaos reigns, Sandra sneaks off to see Rex, the married love she can't let go of. S10 E2: Mrs Hennessey Comes to Call
A horsebox belonging to Lady Lawrence is delivered to the station - and Wilfred is on hand with the essentials - while Harry's signal box seems to be on fire. S1 E6: Horse Play
With all the money gone, the Meldrum family and its servants look to the future - can Lady Lavender and Cissy save them all from financial ruin? S4 E6 Well, There You Are Then...!
Chrissy is practising for her driving test and is receiving lessons from Robin; meanwhile, George has started making home brew liquor which turns out stronger than expected. S4 E2: One for the Road
Miss Courtney informs Mr. Brown and the class that they will be expected to prepare an act for the school talent show in three days time. : After Three
The long-suffering Johnsons help Alf out when he's shut out after coming home late from the pub. S2 E2
Beryl's gin-soaked mum, Mrs Hennessey, arrives, insulting everyone. As chaos reigns, Sandra sneaks off to see Rex, the married love she can't let go of. S10 E2: Mrs Hennessey Comes to Call
The boys consider the impact of their father moving back into the Boswell household, while Nellie is shocked at her husband's changing views on his faith. S2 E5
Arthur starts a courier service, the Daley Post, and it isn't long before its competitors start throwing the wrong sort of business at him. S9 E3: Uneasy Rider
A horsebox belonging to Lady Lawrence is delivered to the station - and Wilfred is on hand with the essentials - while Harry's signal box seems to be on fire. S1 E6: Horse Play
When Gary enters Duckett's Passage from the wrong end, he finds himself in the 1880s where Jack the Ripper is on the loose. S6 E5: The 'Ouses in Between
Mr. Bean goes to the funfair and ends up having to watch over a baby; will the mother find them in time? E10: Mind the Baby, Mr. Bean
Series about a detective who wakes up in what seems to be 1973. Sam discovers that Gene Hunt is planning to plant evidence to secure the conviction of an elusive criminal. Starring John Simm. S1 E2
Beryl pushes Sandra to spend a week with Rex while her mums in hospital. As Sandra gambles on love, Gwyn abruptly goes on the run. S10 E5: Going Into Hospital
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!
Malcolm's business has taken off and there's a constant stream of motorbikes at the Stoneway household but not everyone's happy. S3 E5: Wrenching
Sharon gets a visit from estranged husband Chris who is seeking a quick divorce so that he can marry his new love Angie - a blind woman - but Tracey has a few doubts. S10 E6: Blinded By Love
Rowan Atkinson stars as the hapless Mr. Bean. In this original award-winning episode, he takes an exam, sunbathes and goes to church with Richard Briers. Ep1: Mr. Bean

Lily and Walter find out they're not legally married. Walter stays with Nellie and Eli while he decides whether to marry and he's soon led astray. S3 E3: Get Up Them Stairs
David is carried away by the throb of guitars, the drone of the cicadas, the scent of the bougainvillaea, and most of all by Linda. S1 E3: Praying Mantis
The pilot episode of the 'upstairs downstairs' sitcom by the writers of Hi-de-Hi! Alf and his daughter Ivy enter service at the Meldrum house, but Alf gets a shock after seeing a familiar face.
New resident Ambrose claims he has the power of hypnosis due to his gypsy blood - Rigsby is sceptical but soon wonders if Ambrose's abilities could be used in his favour. S4 E5: Under The Influence
Wolfie and the Tooting Popular Front are terrified by local criminal Fenning over an issue of stolen stereos. S2 E3: The Tooting Connection
The household is in uproar when the Boswells dog needs an operation. Aveline returns from London after her modelling job. S2 E6
Beryl and Sandra protest to save a tree, but Beryl is shocked when Sandra turns firebrand leader, whipping the peaceful demo into unexpected revolt. S10 E3: Spare That Tree
The staff are up early to greet a new arrival at Hatley Station - another arrival later in the day is less welcome... S1 E7: Past Love
The pilot episode of the 'upstairs downstairs' sitcom by the writers of Hi-de-Hi! Alf and his daughter Ivy enter service at the Meldrum house, but Alf gets a shock after seeing a familiar face.
When suspected woodworm is discovered in the upstairs flat, the girls and Robin have to find alternative accommodation while George calls in his so-called handyman. S4 E3: All In The Game
Mr Brown takes in a new student, a feisty Scotsman who speaks in dialect. However, the Scot turns out to be more than anybody can handle. S3 E1: I Belong to Glasgow
Alf acts strangely after being locked out of his bedroom by Mrs Hollingberry. The milkman arrives with good news. S2 E3
Beryl and Sandra protest to save a tree, but Beryl is shocked when Sandra turns firebrand leader, whipping the peaceful demo into unexpected revolt. S10 E3: Spare That Tree
The household is in uproar when the Boswells dog needs an operation. Aveline returns from London after her modelling job. S2 E6
Arthur gets arrested when he attempts to hunt down a new car, and acts very strangely in the process.
